name: github-custom
title: GitHub
description: Quick search, browse, and manage your GitHub repositories from Raycast
author: loudog

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: GitHub PAT with repo, read:org, notifications, gist, workflow, project scopes

preferences.name: localScanPaths
preferences.title: Local Repo Scan Paths
preferences.description: Comma-separated paths to scan for local repos (e.g. ~/code,~/projects)

commands.name: quick-search
commands.title: Quick Search
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: Fuzzy search your GitHub repositories sorted by recent activity
